headline: Rate Joins Growing List of Lenders Leveraging FICO Score 10T to Enhance Mortgage Credit Decisioning
summary: BOZEMAN, Mont., June 09, 2026--Rate adopts FICO® Score 10T, the industry's most predictive score, to enhance mortgage credit decisioning and expand responsible access to credit.
